asset:PORT_HOUSTON.label: Port of Houston
asset:PORT_HOUSTON.note: Largest US port by foreign waterborne tonnage

corridor:HOUSTON_SHIP_CHANNEL.label: Houston Ship Channel
corridor:HOUSTON_SHIP_CHANNEL.note: 52-mile waterway connecting Port Houston to Galveston Bay

facility:EXXON_BAYTOWN.label: ExxonMobil Baytown Refinery Complex
facility:EXXON_BAYTOWN.note: 560,000+ bpd capacity, directly on Houston Ship Channel

facility:VALERO_HOUSTON.label: Valero Houston Refinery
facility:VALERO_HOUSTON.note: 205,000 bpd, Manchester neighborhood, adjacent to Ship Channel

facility:LYONDELLBASELL_CHANNELVIEW.label: LyondellBasell Channelview Complex
facility:LYONDELLBASELL_CHANNELVIEW.note: ~20 miles east of downtown Houston on Ship Channel

facility:DOW_FREEPORT.label: Dow Freeport Complex
facility:DOW_FREEPORT.note: One of largest integrated chemical sites in Western Hemisphere

facility:ARKEMA_CROSBY.label: Arkema Crosby Plant
facility:ARKEMA_CROSBY.note: Organic peroxide manufacturing, ~25 miles NE of Houston

asset:CENTERPOINT_GRID.label: CenterPoint Energy Grid
asset:CENTERPOINT_GRID.note: Electric utility serving Houston metro, ~800K customers lost power
